description: Stable coking, quenching and by-product operation
ai_reasoning_summary: Telemetry patterns within normal ranges across zones.

description: Small leak causing elevated gas levels but below critical
recommended_response: Investigate source, increase monitoring, prepare for escalation
ai_reasoning_summary: Slow rise in gas sensors, early warning thresholds triggered.

description: Significant leak causing critical gas levels in confined space
recommended_response: Evacuate affected zones, isolate gas, SCBA entry only, initiate emergency shutdown
ai_reasoning_summary: Rapid gas accumulation with multiple sensors reaching critical ranges.

description: Short-term surge in hydraulic or gas pressure
recommended_response: Check relief valves and isolation valves, inspect equipment
ai_reasoning_summary: Fast spike in pressure sensors followed by recovery.

description: Authorized hot work begins in a hazardous area
recommended_response: Verify permits, gas tests, supervision, PPE, fire watchers
ai_reasoning_summary: Hot work permit active in high-risk zone affecting risk weighting.

description: Worker enters confined space under permit
recommended_response: Ensure isolation, continuous gas monitoring, rescue plan ready
ai_reasoning_summary: Confined space permit active, any gas anomaly becomes critical.

description: Failure or trip of critical pump in by-product or quench system
recommended_response: Switch to backup, isolate system, investigate cause
ai_reasoning_summary: Flow and level deviations with equipment trip indications.

description: Failure of isolation or control valve in gas distribution
ai_reasoning_summary: Gas and pressure anomalies near valve gallery with abnormal valve states.

description: Smoke detected along quench track or battery
ai_reasoning_summary: Smoke detector spikes and camera-verified smoke.

description: Confirmed fire or ember hotspot in coke or equipment
recommended_response: Activate fire suppression, evacuate area, call fire team
ai_reasoning_summary: IR hotspot and smoke signals consistent with fire.

description: Loss of power to part of the plant
recommended_response: Switch to emergency supply, safe shutdown of equipment
ai_reasoning_summary: Telemetry shows multiple equipment status changes and flatlining sensors.

description: Controlled emergency shutdown of plant section
recommended_response: Execute shutdown SOP, confirm isolation and safe states
ai_reasoning_summary: Sensors show equipment ramp-down, valves closed, flows stopped.

description: Worker enters restricted zone without authorization
recommended_response: Alert security and safety, escort worker out, investigate
ai_reasoning_summary: RFID/CV shows worker in zone without matching permit.

recommended_response: Warn worker, enforce PPE policy, log violation
ai_reasoning_summary: CV/worker data show mismatch between PPE level and zone requirements.

recommended_response: Verify permits and isolation, adjust risk weighting
ai_reasoning_summary: Maintenance start event contextualizes sensor deviations.

recommended_response: Verify restoration of normal operation, close permit
ai_reasoning_summary: Sensor patterns return to normal after maintenance.

recommended_response: Call medical response, evacuate local area, assist worker
ai_reasoning_summary: CV/RTLS indicate immobile worker plus abnormal vital signs or reports.
